PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?duration WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P1303 wd:Q15933 ; wdt:P1303 wd:Q22205 ; wdt:P580 ?eventStart .
  BIND(year(?eventStart) AS ?year)
  FILTER(?year IN(1978 , 2008 , 2009))
  ?game wdt:P174 ?event ; wdt:P2513 ?duration .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 3
